name: Fresh Tomato and Avocado Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 jalapeno chili, seeded and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients.
2. Cover and refrigerate 1 to 2 hours to blend flavors.
3. Just before serving, stir in the avocado.
4. Serve at room temperature.
Makes about 2 1/2 cups salsa.
